title: Share this?
question: Do you want to share this {{kind}}?
description: A copy will be uploaded to your personal workspace and made public. Your local file stays on your disk, untouched.
successDescription: Your copy now lives in your personal workspace and anyone with the link can view it.
errorDescription: Something went wrong while uploading. Please try again.
offline: You need an internet connection to share.
needAccount: Sign in to share to your personal workspace.
wsQuestion: Upload this whole local workspace to your cloud workspace?
wsAlreadyUploaded: This workspace is already in the cloud. Choose how to sync your local changes.
wsMergeDesc: Add and update from local; keep items that only exist in the cloud.
wsOverrideDesc: Delete the previous cloud copy and upload everything fresh.
wsDescription: Every document, board and mesh will be copied to your personal workspace and made public. References between them are remapped and assets uploaded so everything works. Your local files stay on your disk, untouched.
wsSuccessDescription: {{published}} of {{total}} items are now in your personal workspace and public.
wsEmpty: This workspace has nothing to upload yet.
